title: Recruitment for a Chief Financial Officer
body: "We have a vacancy for a Chief Financial Officer.  Job Title  Chief Financial Officer  Grade  G6  Salary & Pension  £73,165 per annum with Pension Scheme  Annual Leave entitlement  Commencing at 25 days  Role  The Chief Finance Officer (CFO) is a key role in the Veterinary Medicines Directorate (VMD), reporting to the Chief Operating Officer and accountable to the Chief Executive Officer of the VMD.  As CFO, you will be responsible for all financial operations, including strategic financial planning, risk management, budgeting, and reporting. You will provide financial advice for decision making and act as a key partner to the CEO and others to achieve business goals.   How to apply  You must make your application via Chief Financial Officer - Civil Service Jobs - GOV.UK where you will find a full job description.  Closing Date  15 December 2025 "
